case_title: HAROLD PARKER PROPERTIES, LP VS. LARRY COHEN et al

docket_entries.description: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COHEN, LARRY COHEN LAW FIRM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2087 UNION STREET, SUITE 2, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
